title: viola × poelliana
intro: Viola × poelliana, a hybrid species of the viola plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the violaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola × poelliana include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
